draft.conclusion: 评审结论：存在阻塞问题，请求修改。

findings.problem: The patch never includes the current email value in the token hash. email hash 邮箱 hash 邮箱 失效 old token valid change email _make_hash_value email
findings.evidence: Changing a user's email after issuing a reset token will not invalidate the old token because _make_hash_value still returns only pk, password, last_login, and timestamp. _make_hash_value invalidate
findings.impact: Changing a user's email after issuing a reset token will not invalidate the old token because _make_hash_value still returns only pk, password, last_login, and timestamp. _make_hash_value invalidate
findings.fix: Include the configured email field value in _make_hash_value while preserving compatibility for custom user models. _make_hash_value compatibility

draft.tests: The added test covers empty email but not the email-change invalidation sequence. The real regression is: create token, change email, then check that the old token is rejected. The new test only proves a token can be created and checked when email is empty. 测试 邮箱 变更 测试 旧 token empty email change email test check_token False
